formName: Step 3 - Technical Information - Source of Water for Water Licence Application
formDescription: This section of the form identifies the source of water for the application, specifically focusing on whether the water is sourced from a well and evaluating its proximity and potential hydraulic connection to surface water bodies like lakes, streams, or springs.

WaterDivertedUsingWell.title: Is the water you are applying for coming from a well?
WaterDivertedUsingWell.description: Identifies if the application involves diverting groundwater via a well system.

GWNAWellHydraulicallyConnected.title: Does any documentation, such as a well construction report, indicate that there is a hydraulic connection between the well and a surface water source?
GWNAWellHydraulicallyConnected.description: Indicates if existing documentation confirms a physical or hydraulic link between the aquifer and nearby surface water.

GWNASourceOfSurfaceWater.title: Please describe the source of the nearby surface water (e.g., lake, stream, spring).
GWNASourceOfSurfaceWater.description: A detailed description or name of the surface water body located in proximity to the well site.
